description: Windows desktop automation using pywinauto with multi-application and multi-window support

open_application.name: Open Application
open_application.description: Start a Windows application by its executable path

connect_to_application.name: Connect To Application
connect_to_application.description: Connect to an already running application by process ID or window title

list_applications.name: List Applications
list_applications.description: Get list of all tracked application instance IDs

list_windows.name: List Windows
list_windows.description: Get list of all tracked window instance IDs

get_current_application.name: Get Current Application
get_current_application.description: Get the ID of the currently active application

get_current_window.name: Get Current Window
get_current_window.description: Get the ID of the currently active window

wait_for_window.name: Wait For Window
wait_for_window.description: Wait for a window with the specified title to appear

switch_window.name: Switch Window
switch_window.description: Switch the current window context by ID, title, or index

click_element.name: Click Element
click_element.description: Click a UI element using its selector

double_click_element.name: Double Click Element
double_click_element.description: Double-click a UI element using its selector

input_text.name: Input Text
input_text.description: Type text into a control or the active window

press_keys.name: Press Keys
press_keys.description: Send keyboard key combinations to the active window

get_element_text.name: Get Element Text
get_element_text.description: Get the text content from a UI element

get_window_text.name: Get Window Text
get_window_text.description: Get the text content of the current window

wait_until_element_exists.name: Wait Until Element Exists
wait_until_element_exists.description: Wait until a UI element with the specified selector exists

wait_until_element_visible.name: Wait Until Element Visible
wait_until_element_visible.description: Wait until a UI element becomes visible

close_window.name: Close Window
close_window.description: Close the current or specified window

close_application.name: Close Application
close_application.description: Close the current or specified application, or all applications

mouse_hover.name: Mouse Hover
mouse_hover.description: Move mouse cursor over an element without clicking

drag_and_drop.name: Drag And Drop
drag_and_drop.description: Drag a source element and drop it onto a target element

scroll_element.name: Scroll Element
scroll_element.description: Scroll inside an element in the specified direction

maximize_window.name: Maximize Window
maximize_window.description: Maximize the current or specified window

minimize_window.name: Minimize Window
minimize_window.description: Minimize the current or specified window

attach_by_pid.name: Attach By PID
attach_by_pid.description: Attach to a running application by its process ID

wait_until_window_closed.name: Wait Until Window Closed
wait_until_window_closed.description: Wait until a window with the specified title is closed

take_screenshot.name: Take Screenshot
take_screenshot.description: Capture a screenshot of the current window

set_screenshot_on_failure.name: Set Screenshot On Failure
set_screenshot_on_failure.description: Configure automatic screenshot capture on activity failures

validate_selector.name: Validate Selector
validate_selector.description: Validate that a selector matches a UI element

get_element_attribute.name: Get Element Attribute
get_element_attribute.description: Get an attribute value from a UI element

wait_until_element_contains_text.name: Wait Until Element Contains Text
wait_until_element_contains_text.description: Wait until a UI element contains specified text

get_element_properties.name: Get Element Properties
get_element_properties.description: Get detailed properties of a UI element
